section_57.title: Electronic Records as Primary Evidence
section_57.requirement: Original digital file produced from proper custody is treated as primary evidence.

section_61.title: Admissibility of Electronic Records
conditions: Device must be operating properly during data creation
Information must be fed in the ordinary course of activity
Integrity of the data must be maintained

audit_rules.logic: The QVAC engine must generate a unique SHA-256 hash to satisfy Section 63 requirements.
Check for 'created_at' and 'modified_at' consistency to prove non-tampering.
